derived.allGoals: fat loss and appetite control, simple repeated meal-prep options

retrieval.vectorContext:
Issue: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome - Moderate - Endocrine. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Sugary drinks, Trans-fat rich fast food), Exercises to avoid (Excessive training with insufficient recovery, Very high-volume HIIT blocks)
Issue: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome - Mild-Moderate - Endocrine. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Sugary drinks), Exercises to avoid (Excessive training with insufficient recovery, Very high-volume HIIT blocks)
Issue: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome - Moderate - Endocrine. Constraints: Foods to avoid (Trans-fat rich fast food, Sugary drinks), Exercises to avoid (Very high-volume HIIT blocks, Excessive training with insufficient recovery)
